title: ligustrum robustum subsp. walkeri
intro: Ligustrum robustum subsp. walkeri, also known as Walker's Privet or Indian Privet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. It is native to the Indian subcontinent and is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ligustrum robustum subsp. walkeri include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable herb for various health ailments. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and benefits.
